description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to develop, master, main, and releases branches and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: test and lint. The test job runs on a matrix of Linux, macOS, and Windows environments with multiple Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, determines the month number and venv path, restores cache, creates a virtual environment if necessary, and runs tests with tox. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12, determines the month number, restores cache, creates a virtual environment if necessary, builds documentation, and checks type annotations with tox and mypy.
